note: Re-measured 2026-07-18 on the noisy virtualized sandbox host (median-of-15) after PR#14 (FixedVec nodes + T=32 default). Values are 15-sample medians; each tolerance_pct = 1.5x the worst observed deviation from the median across those samples (min 10%). Re-record with `make perf/baseline` (same median-of-N method) on the real bench machine before relying on `make perf/check` there.
